titleStmt.title: SII 28.168: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 168. (A.R. No. 323 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, southern entrance into the first prākara.

p.hi: Kṛishṇayadēva-mahārāya Śaka 1432, Pramōdūta, Makara ba. amāvāsya, Monday, Pūṟāḍaṁ = 1510 A.D., December 30.

summary.p: Records the grant of 3 villages for meeting the expenses for the worship (daily as well as on the special occasions enumerated) of God Aḻagiya-Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiya-tambirāṉār in the eastern block (kīḻ-paṟṟu) of Araśūr in Veṇṇaiyūr-nāḍu in Irājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu on the northern bank of Bhuvanēkavīraṉpaṭṭaṇa-chchīrmai and in a feeding house (chattiram), with the irēkai (assessment) accruing from those three villages, by Appā-piḷḷai, son of Kāḍuveṭṭi-ppaḷi āḻvār of Kauṇḍinya-ya-gōtram and Āpastaṁbha-sūtram belonging to Mahipālakulakālachchēri (a hamlet of ?) Uttiramēru alias Irājēndirachōḻa-chchaturvēdimaṅgalam, a taṉiyūr in Puliyūr-nāḍu in Kāliūr-kōṭṭam in Toṇḍaimaṇḍalam alias Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. The villages were to be enjoyed as sarvamānya along with the eight kind of rights (by the temple). The villages seem to have been granted to the donor for this purpose by the king (irāyar).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§śubhamastu . svasti . śrīman Irācātirācan Irācaparamecuran śrīvīrappiratāpan śrīvīra
kiṣṇayateva mahārāyar pratuvīrācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa śakāttam 1000 4 100 3 10 2ṉmel
cellā niṉṟa pramodūta samvatcarattu makaranāyaṟṟu Amara pakṣattu comavāramum
Amaāvāsyaiyum peṟṟa pūrāṭattu nāḷ toṇṭai maṇṭalamāṉa ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻa
maṇṭalattu kāliūrkkoṭṭattu puliyūr nāṭṭil taṉiyūr Uttarameruvāṉa Irācentiracoḻac
catuṟuvetimaṅkalattu mahipālakulakālacceri kuṇṭiṉṉiya kottiṟattu Āpattampa cūttiṟattu
kāṭuveṭṭip paḷḷiāḻvār piḷḷai puttiraṉ śrīmatu Appāpiḷḷai kuṭutta taṉma cātaṉap paṭṭayam namakku Irāyar
pālittaruḷiya puvaṉekavīraṉ paṭṭaṇac cīrmai vaṭakarai Irācātirāca vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇaiyūr nāṭṭil Aracūr
kiḻpaṟṟil cetta Uṭaiyār Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiya tampirāṉāṟku makara pūcaikkum cattirattukkum
camuttirakkaraiyil kuyyatittattil puṇṇiyamāka tārāpūṟuvamākak kuṭutta melaikkumārāṭci kiṟāmam
Oṉṟukku Irekai 5 10 5m kiṟāmam Oṉṟukku Irekai kūttaṉ koyil kiṟāmam
Oṉṟukku Irekai 2 10 5 Āka kiṟāmam 3kku Irekai 4 100 Itil viḷainta mutal koṇṭu nāḷ Oṉṟuk
ku Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai paṇṇiṉa taḷikai 10 2kku ḷaiḷu 2 paṇiyāram 10 2kku �
kaṟiyamuturu paccama nuntāviḷakku 2kku � cantaṉam palam pattum kaṟpūram kāl
kaḻañcum kastūri Araikkāl kaḻañcum kuṅkumam kāl kaḻañcum paṉnīr palam Oṉṟum cātteṇṇai
Uḻakkum koṟṟaṅkuṭiyil tirumañcaṉakkuṭam nālum tirumañcaṉattukku pāl nāṉāḻi tayir
nāṉāḻiyum caṟkarai palam Iraṇṭum teṉ Uriyum paḻam Irupatum teṅkāyiraṇṭum Iḷanir Añcum
tirumālai[ kku] caraṭu pattum varuṣam Oṉṟukku cāttum tarattuc celai nālum kaṭaḷaic celai nālum mu
tuṇṭam nālum tiruvātirait tirumañcaṉattukku puḻu patiṉkaḻañcum kaṟpūram patiṉkaḻañ
cum kastūri patiṉkaḻañcum cantaṉam palam nālum paṉṉir palam Aṟupatu‘patu’ is written below the line.m ciṟappukku 1000mum
cattirattukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku pirāmaṇar per 10 2[ kku] yum kaṟacampāram mel veccam
tayirukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku � 1(1/4)m Ākakaṭṭaḷai paṇṇiṉapaṭiyāle Inta muṉṟu grāmattil
Uṇṭāṉa catuṟ cīrmaikkuḷ paṭṭa netinikṣeyaRead niti nikṣepacelapāṣāṇa Akṣiṇiyākāmi cittacāttiyam Eṉkiṉṟa
Aṣṭapokat te[ja*]cuvāmiyattuṭaṉe caṟuvamānnyamāka cantiṟātityavaraiyum Aṉupavittuk koḷḷavum Inta
taṉmattukku Ahitam niṉaittavarkaḷ keṅkaikkaraiyile koppirāmaṇiṉaikkoṉṟa pāvattile
poka kaṭavarkaḷākavum [*.] dānapālanayormmaddhye dānācre yonupālanam . dānat svarggamavāpnoti pāla
[nādarcya] tam padam . § Appaṉ
Digital edition of SII 28.168 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
